audit_items.proof_trace: The property holds: remaining asset is transferred to s_feeAggregator when hasFeeAggregator is true (design-intentional conditional — when feeAggregator == address(this) assets stay in the self-aggregator contract), and assetOut balance is unconditionally transferred to s_assetOutReceiver. Both s_assetOut and s_assetOutReceiver are protected by _whenNoLiveAuctions() in their respective setters, preventing destination changes during active auctions. The case asset == s_assetOut can never reach _onAuctionEnd because performUpkeep handles it via direct transfer without setting s_auctionStarts, causing the endedAuctions loop to revert with InvalidAuction.
